title: Bribe Generals
content: A thievery operation that attempts to remove enemy generals and weaken military effectiveness.

title: Greater Arson
content: A thievery operation that damages enemy buildings and reduces province infrastructure.

title: Fireball
content: An offensive spell that damages an enemy province by reducing peasants and resources.

title: Meteor Showers
content: A powerful offensive spell that causes ongoing damage to an enemy province.

title: Chastity
content: A spell that limits population growth and weakens enemy recovery.

title: Amnesia
content: A spell that removes enemy knowledge and weakens science progress.

title: Greed
content: A spell that increases enemy losses and reduces economic efficiency.

title: Pitfalls
content: A defensive spell that causes attacking armies to suffer additional losses.

title: Explosions
content: An operation or attack effect that damages enemy structures and weakens a province.

title: War Goals
content: Strategic objectives used by kingdoms during hostile actions and wars.

title: Hostile Meter
content: A measure of kingdom relations that determines access to certain hostile actions and war mechanics.

title: Unfriendly Status
content: A kingdom relation state reached through hostile actions that enables additional interactions.

title: Hostile Status
content: A kingdom relation state indicating active conflict and increased access to war actions.
